text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our senior-year summer camp has begun! Some
students are on edge, but Matikanetannhauser
stays as calm and optimistic as ever.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She cheerfully shares some riddles with her friends
as they head to the campground.
